title: Sea Commando
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:AttackFromMonCalamari.jpg|thumb|right|200px|A New Republic Sea Commando boarding party at the Battle of Mon Calamari.]]
{{Quote|Yeah -- That's why he ordered us Sea-Commandos to launch boarding parties!|Unidentified New Republic Sea Commando|<ref name="DE">''[[Star Wars: Dark Empire]]''</ref>}}
'''Sea Commandos''' were special [[Alliance Military/Legends|Rebel Alliance Military]] units specializing in various types of aquatic combat. They eventually became part of the [[New Republic Defense Force/Legends|New Republic Military]] after its inception.

==History==
Several years before the return of [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]], the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire]] researched a possible gravity well generator in the [[Sedri system/Legends|Sedri system]]. The soldiers who participated in the operation made use of special equipment which allowed them to function at all depths beneath the oceans of [[Sedri/Legends|Sedri]]. When the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] first landed on the planet, it was the native [[Sedrian]]s who gave them them training and valuable experience in the art of aquatic warfare. This allowed the Rebels to sneak on board the Imperial garrison base and examine the Imperial equipment. Based on this knowledge and discussions with the Sedrians, the Sea Commandos were born.<ref name="DES">''[[Dark Empire Sourcebook]]''</ref>

After the formation of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]], the Sea Commandos were adopted as part of their military. In [[10 ABY/Legends|10 ABY]] Sea Commando teams were present at the [[Battle of Calamari]] where they boarded [[World Devastator]]s attacking the planet [[Dac/Legends|Dac]].<ref name="DE" />

==Training==
Sea Commandos were constantly shipped from world to world to broaden their experience and produce reliable soldiers the New Republic could turn to for any duty in an aquatic environment. They were trained in all manner of water environment; from moving through bogs and bayous to climbing up waterfalls and cataracts. Equipment typically carried by Sea Commandos included [[Blaster rifle/Legends|blaster rifles]], [[Concussion grenade/Legends|concussion grenades]], [[Stun grenade/Legends|stun grenades]], grapple guns, [[Blast helmet/Legends|blast helmets]], [[blast armor]], waterproof uniforms, and [[Survival kit/Legends|survival kits]].<ref name="DES" />
